mapper.select: select algorithm_uuid, algorithm_name, status, whether_to_compare, compare_group, code, abbreviation, create_time, min_mem, video_memory, algorithm_lesion, file_type, model_version, direction, nividia_amount, request_url, request_ip, image_size, timeout_seconds from aipre_algorithm where algorithm_uuid = #{algorithmUuid}

select algorithm_uuid, algorithm_name, status, whether_to_compare, compare_group, code, abbreviation, create_time, min_mem, video_memory, algorithm_lesion, file_type, model_version, direction, nividia_amount, request_url, request_ip, image_size, timeout_seconds from patsaas.aipre_algorithm
mapper.insert: insert into aipre_algorithm(algorithm_name, status, whether_to_compare, compare_group, code, abbreviation, create_time, min_mem, video_memory, algorithm_lesion, file_type, model_version, direction, nividia_amount, request_url, request_ip, image_size, timeout_seconds) values (#{algorithmName}, #{status}, #{whetherToCompare}, #{compareGroup}, #{code}, #{abbreviation}, #{createTime}, #{minMem}, #{videoMemory}, #{algorithmLesion}, #{fileType}, #{modelVersion}, #{direction}, #{nividiaAmount}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestIp}, #{imageSize}, #{timeoutSeconds})

insert into aipre_algorithm(algorithm_name, status, whether_to_compare, compare_group, code, abbreviation, create_time, min_mem, video_memory, algorithm_lesion, file_type, model_version, direction, nividia_amount, request_url, request_ip, image_size, timeout_seconds) values
(#{entity.algorithmName}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.whetherToCompare}, #{entity.compareGroup}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.abbreviation}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.minMem}, #{entity.videoMemory}, #{entity.algorithmLesion}, #{entity.fileType}, #{entity.modelVersion}, #{entity.direction}, #{entity.nividiaAmount}, #{entity.requestUrl}, #{entity.requestIp}, #{entity.imageSize}, #{entity.timeoutSeconds})

insert into aipre_algorithm(algorithm_name, status, whether_to_compare, compare_group, code, abbreviation, create_time, min_mem, video_memory, algorithm_lesion, file_type, model_version, direction, nividia_amount, request_url, request_ip, image_size, timeout_seconds) values
(#{entity.algorithmName}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.whetherToCompare}, #{entity.compareGroup}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.abbreviation}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.minMem}, #{entity.videoMemory}, #{entity.algorithmLesion}, #{entity.fileType}, #{entity.modelVersion}, #{entity.direction}, #{entity.nividiaAmount}, #{entity.requestUrl}, #{entity.requestIp}, #{entity.imageSize}, #{entity.timeoutSeconds})
on duplicate key update algorithm_name = values(algorithm_name), status = values(status), whether_to_compare = values(whether_to_compare), compare_group = values(compare_group), code = values(code), abbreviation = values(abbreviation), create_time = values(create_time), min_mem = values(min_mem), video_memory = values(video_memory), algorithm_lesion = values(algorithm_lesion), file_type = values(file_type), model_version = values(model_version), direction = values(direction), nividia_amount = values(nividia_amount), request_url = values(request_url), request_ip = values(request_ip), image_size = values(image_size), timeout_seconds = values(timeout_seconds)
mapper.update:
update aipre_algorithm
algorithm_name = #{algorithmName},
status = #{status},
whether_to_compare = #{whetherToCompare},
compare_group = #{compareGroup},
code = #{code},
abbreviation = #{abbreviation},
create_time = #{createTime},
min_mem = #{minMem},
video_memory = #{videoMemory},
algorithm_lesion = #{algorithmLesion},
file_type = #{fileType},
model_version = #{modelVersion},
direction = #{direction},
nividia_amount = #{nividiaAmount},
request_url = #{requestUrl},
request_ip = #{requestIp},
image_size = #{imageSize},
timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds},
where algorithm_uuid = #{algorithmUuid}
